name: Call to Thread run() instead of start()
description: The product calls a thread's run() method directly instead of start(), causing the code to execute in the caller's thread rather than spawning a new thread. This defeats the purpose of multithreading and can cause concurrency-related reliability and security issues.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node representing a Thread object where an EXTERNAL call invokes run() directly instead of start(). Look for method invocation patterns on Thread-typed objects where the call target is run() rather than start().
